Orderly.description: Early, ambitious action. Global warming limited to 1.5C. Smooth transition, low transition & physical risk.

Disorderly.description: Delayed policy action until 2030, then sharp policy shock. 1.6C warming but high transition risk.

Hot House World.description: Only currently implemented policies. Severe physical risks, critical warming.

Too Little Too Late.description: Fragmented action, insufficient NDCs. High transition AND physical risk.

use_case: Stress testing Japan subnational risk portfolios under NGFS scenarios for TCFD/ISSB S2 climate disclosure.
source: NGFS Scenarios Portal Phase IV (November 2023), mapped to Risk Space MCP RCP projections
